childMarkdownRemark.rawMarkdownBody: Aaron Meese is an active duty soldier in the United States Army. He has been trained across a wide variety of disciplines and worked in several different positions throughout his time in the military, including completing the Joint Cyber Analysis Course (JCAC) as a Cryptologic Network Warfare Specialist and the Basic Analysis and Reporting Course (BARC) as a Signals Intelligence Analyst. He is currently on loan from the Army to the National Security Agency's Cybersecurity Directorate, where he works as a dual-authority defensive network analyst.

Kara Meese is a retired veteran of the United States Army, who has since resolved to pursue her dual passions of art and psychology. She was in training to become a Signals Intelligence Analyst for her reservist unit at Fort Bragg, North Carolina, when she sustained injuries and was subsequently medically retired.
